headline: Ecolab Inc. (ECL) Gets Upgraded to Buy From Hold by Berenberg – Here’s Why
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is one of the best ethical companies to invest in now according to Reddit. On March 16, Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) was upgraded to Buy from Hold by Berenberg, with the firm adjusting the price target on the stock to $326 from $300. Berenberg told investors in a research note that it will […]

headline: Ecolab Named One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies for 20th Consecutive Year
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 18, 2026--Ecolab Inc., a global leader in water, hygiene and infection prevention solutions and services that protect people and the resources vital to life, today announced it has been named one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices. This marks Ecolab’s 20th consecutive year receiving the recognition—an achievement only a small number of companies worldwide can claim

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Ecolab, Lowers Price Target to $285
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $310 to $285.
